modules.module_title: Introduction to Skin Anatomy & Physiology, Skin Types & Conditions
Basics of Microdermabrasion (MD) - Principles, Benefits, Types of MD
Microdermabrasion Procedures - Techniques, Equipment Handling, Safety

questions.question: Skin ki sabse upari layer ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Epidermis

questions.explanation: Epidermis skin ki sabse upari layer hai jo hamari body ko protect karti hai.

questions.question: Collagen aur elastin fibres skin ki kis layer mein paaye jaate hain?

options.B: Dermis

questions.explanation: Dermis skin ki woh layer hai jahan collagen aur elastin fibres hote hain, jo skin ko elasticity aur firmness dete hain.

questions.question: Microdermabrasion kis skin layer ko target karta hai primarily?

options.B: Subcutis

questions.explanation: Microdermabrasion primarily skin ki sabse upari dead skin cell layer, Stratum Corneum, ko exfoliate karta hai.

questions.question: Oily skin type ki pehchan kya hai?

options.B: Large pores aur shiny appearance

questions.explanation: Oily skin mein sebaceous glands overactive hote hain, jisse large pores aur shiny appearance hota hai.

questions.question: Hyperpigmentation ka matlab kya hai?

options.B: Skin par dark patches ya spots ka banna

questions.explanation: Hyperpigmentation mein skin par melanin production badh jaati hai, jisse dark spots ya patches bante hain.

questions.question: Sensitive skin wale clients ke liye MD karte waqt kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Aggressive passes karna
options.C: Gentle approach aur lower settings use karna

questions.explanation: Sensitive skin par irritation se bachne ke liye gentle approach aur lower settings use karna important hai.

questions.question: Sun-damaged skin ke common signs kya hain?

options.B: Fine lines, wrinkles, uneven skin tone, sunspots

questions.explanation: Sun exposure se skin mein premature aging signs jaise fine lines, wrinkles, uneven tone aur sunspots dikhte hain.

questions.question: Keratinocytes skin ki kis layer mein paye jaate hain?

options.B: Hypodermis

questions.explanation: Keratinocytes epidermis ke main cells hain jo skin ko structure aur protection provide karte hain.

questions.question: Skin ka pH level generally kitna hota hai?

options.B: Neutral (7)

questions.explanation: Healthy skin ka natural pH slightly acidic hota hai (approx 4.5-5.5) jo 'acid mantle' banata hai aur skin ko bacteria se protect karta hai.

questions.question: Melanin ka main function kya hai?

options.B: Skin ko UV radiation se protect karna

questions.explanation: Melanin ek pigment hai jo skin, hair aur eyes ko color deta hai aur UV radiation se protection provide karta hai.

questions.question: Dry skin type ke liye kaun sa ingredient beneficial hoga?

options.B: Hyaluronic Acid

questions.explanation: Hyaluronic Acid ek powerful humectant hai jo skin mein moisture retain karne mein help karta hai, dry skin ke liye bahut beneficial hai.

questions.question: Acne-prone skin mein kis type ke pores common hote hain?

options.B: Enlarged aur clogged pores

questions.explanation: Acne-prone skin mein sebaceous glands overactive hote hain, jisse pores enlarge aur clog ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Skin ki healing process mein kaun sa vitamin important role play karta hai?

options.B: Vitamin C

questions.explanation: Vitamin C collagen synthesis aur wound healing ke liye essential hai, aur ek powerful antioxidant bhi hai.

questions.question: Rosacea se affected skin ki pehchan kya hai?

options.B: Persistent redness, visible blood vessels, bumps

questions.explanation: Rosacea ek chronic inflammatory skin condition hai jismein chehre par redness, visible blood vessels aur bumps dikhte hain.

questions.question: Mature skin mein commonly kya changes dikhai dete hain?

options.B: Reduced elasticity, fine lines, wrinkles, dryness

questions.explanation: Aging ke saath skin mein collagen aur elastin production kam hoti hai, jisse elasticity kam hoti hai aur fine lines, wrinkles, dryness badhte hain.

questions.question: Sebum ka function kya hai?

options.A: Skin ko UV rays se bachana
options.B: Skin ko hydrate aur protect karna

questions.explanation: Sebum ek oily substance hai jo sebaceous glands produce karte hain, yeh skin aur hair ko lubricate aur waterproof karta hai.

questions.question: Which of these is NOT a primary function of the skin?

options.B: Sensation

questions.explanation: Skin ke primary functions mein protection, sensation, temperature regulation, aur Vitamin D synthesis shamil hain. Blood purification kidneys aur liver ka kaam hai.

questions.question: Microdermabrasion kya hai?

options.B: A surgical procedure

questions.explanation: Microdermabrasion ek non-invasive procedure hai jo skin ki upari layer ko gently exfoliate karta hai mechanical means se.

questions.question: Microdermabrasion ka main benefit kya hai?

options.B: Improved skin texture aur tone

questions.explanation: MD dead skin cells ko remove karke skin texture, tone aur overall appearance ko improve karta hai.

questions.question: Microdermabrasion ke through kaun si skin condition treat ki ja sakti hai?

options.B: Deep surgical scars
options.C: Fine lines, mild sun damage, superficial acne scars

questions.explanation: MD fine lines, mild sun damage, superficial acne scars aur uneven skin tone jaise issues ko improve karne mein effective hai.

questions.question: Crystal Microdermabrasion mein kaun se particles use kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Diamond-tipped wands

questions.explanation: Crystal MD mein fine aluminium oxide crystals skin par spray kiye jaate hain aur suction ke through dead skin cells ke saath remove kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Diamond Microdermabrasion mein kya use hota hai?

options.B: A diamond-tipped handpiece

questions.explanation: Diamond MD mein ek diamond-tipped wand ka use hota hai jo skin ko gently abrade karta hai aur dead cells ko suction ke through remove karta hai.

questions.question: Microdermabrasion treatment kitni der tak chal sakta hai generally?

options.B: 20-30 minutes

questions.explanation: Ek typical MD session face ke liye generally 20-30 minutes tak chalta hai, depending on the area being treated.

questions.question: MD ke baad skin par kya effect dikhai de sakta hai immediate?

options.B: Mild redness aur sensitivity

questions.explanation: MD ke baad skin par mild redness aur sensitivity common hai, jo kuch ghanto mein ya ek din mein subside ho jaati hai.

questions.question: MD treatment ke liye kitne sessions ki zaroorat pad sakti hai for optimal results?

options.B: 10-15 sessions

questions.explanation: Optimal results ke liye generally 5-10 sessions ki series recommend ki jaati hai, depending on the client's skin concerns.

questions.question: MD treatment ke sessions ke beech kitna gap hona chahiye?

options.B: Every 2-4 weeks

questions.explanation: Skin ko recover hone aur regenerate hone ka time dene ke liye sessions ke beech 2-4 weeks ka gap maintain karna chahiye.

questions.question: MD treatment ke baad skin products ka absorption kyun badh jaata hai?

options.A: Skin pores tight ho jaate hain
options.B: Dead skin cells remove ho jaate hain
options.C: Blood circulation kam ho jaati hai

questions.explanation: Dead skin cells remove hone se skin ki upari barrier hat jaati hai, jisse products skin mein deep penetrate kar paate hain.

questions.question: Microdermabrasion se kis type ke scars improve ho sakte hain?

options.B: Keloid scars

questions.explanation: MD superficial acne scars aur post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation ko fade karne mein help karta hai, deep scars ke liye yeh effective nahi hai.

questions.question: MD treatment ke liye kaun sa season best mana jaata hai?

options.B: Winter

questions.explanation: Winter season MD ke liye ideal mana jaata hai kyunki ismein sun exposure kam hota hai, jisse post-treatment hyperpigmentation ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: MD ke baad skin par sunscreen lagana kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Skin ko hydrate rakhne ke liye
options.B: Skin ko UV damage aur hyperpigmentation se bachane ke liye
options.C: Pores ko unclog karne ke liye
options.D: Skin ko tight karne ke liye

questions.explanation: MD ke baad skin sensitive ho jaati hai, isliye UV damage aur hyperpigmentation se bachne ke liye sunscreen application critical hai.

questions.question: Microdermabrasion skin mein kis process ko stimulate karta hai?

options.B: Oil production

questions.explanation: MD dead cells ko remove karke skin ko naye cells produce karne ke liye stimulate karta hai, jisse cell turnover aur collagen production badhta hai.

questions.question: What is a common misconception about Microdermabrasion?

options.B: It helps in improving skin texture.
options.D: It's suitable for all skin types.

questions.explanation: MD generally painless hota hai, kuch clients ko mild scratching ya suction feel ho sakti hai. Yeh ek common misconception hai ki yeh painful hai.

questions.question: MD treatment mein suction ka kya role hai?

options.B: Dead skin cells aur debris ko remove karna

questions.explanation: Suction dead skin cells, crystals (agar crystal MD ho toh) aur debris ko skin surface se remove karta hai.

questions.question: MD ke through skin tone mein kya improvement expected hai?

options.B: More even aur radiant skin tone

questions.explanation: MD dead cells aur superficial pigmentation ko remove karke skin tone ko more even aur radiant banata hai.

questions.question: Client consultation mein sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Client ki medical history aur skin concerns discuss karna

questions.explanation: Client ki medical history aur skin concerns samajhna sabse important hai safety aur effective treatment plan ke liye.

questions.question: Microdermabrasion ke liye kaun si condition ek absolute contraindication hai?

options.B: Mild hyperpigmentation

questions.explanation: Active infections jaise herpes breakout MD ke liye absolute contraindication hain kyunki yeh infection ko spread kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar client ne recent past mein accutane use kiya ho, toh MD kitne time tak avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: 1 month

questions.explanation: Accutane skin ko extremely sensitive aur thin bana deta hai, isliye MD ko 6-12 months tak avoid karna chahiye severe complications se bachne ke liye.

questions.question: Client ki skin par patch test karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Treatment ki effectiveness check karne ke liye
options.B: Product ya treatment se hone wali allergic reaction ya sensitivity check karne ke liye
options.C: Client ko uncomfortable feel karane ke liye

questions.explanation: Patch test se hum client ki skin ki sensitivity aur possible allergic reactions ko identify kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Sunburn wali skin par MD karna chahiye ya nahi?

options.B: Nahi, jab tak sunburn heal na ho jaaye
options.C: Sirf mild sunburn par kar sakte hain
options.D: Sunburn ko treat karne ke liye MD best hai

questions.explanation: Sunburned skin already damaged aur sensitive hoti hai, us par MD karne se further irritation aur damage ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Client ko MD se pehle kis type ke products avoid karne ki salah denge?

options.B: Heavy moisturizers

questions.explanation: Retinoids aur strong exfoliants skin ko sensitive bana dete hain, isliye MD se kuch din pehle unhe avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Pregnant clients ke liye Microdermabrasion safe hai ya nahi?

options.B: Avoid karna chahiye ya doctor se consult karna chahiye
options.C: Sirf first trimester mein safe hai
options.D: Only if they have oily skin

questions.explanation: Pregnancy mein hormonal changes ki wajah se skin sensitive ho sakti hai, aur treatment ke chemicals ya stress ka effect ho sakta hai, isliye doctor consultation zaroori hai.

questions.question: Client ko MD treatment ke kya realistic expectations batane chahiye?

options.B: Dramatic results for deep wrinkles and scars
options.C: Gradual improvement in skin texture, tone, and fine lines over multiple sessions

questions.explanation: Clients ko realistic expectations dena zaroori hai, ki results gradual honge aur multiple sessions lagenge.

questions.question: Agar client ko active acne ho toh MD karna chahiye?

options.A: Ha, active acne ko cure karta hai
options.B: Nahi, active acne par MD infection spread kar sakta hai
options.C: Sirf mild active acne par kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Active acne lesions par MD karne se bacteria spread ho sakte hain aur condition bigad sakti hai.

questions.question: Client consultation form mein kaun si information collect karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Medical conditions, allergies, medications, past skin treatments, current skincare routine

questions.explanation: Medical history aur skincare routine ki information treatment safety aur effectiveness ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Pre-treatment instruction mein client ko kya advise denge regarding makeup?

options.A: Heavy makeup laga kar aane ko kahenge
options.B: Makeup laga kar aane ki koi restriction nahi hai
options.C: Treatment se pehle makeup remove karke aane ko kahenge ya clinic mein remove karwayenge
options.D: Sirf eyes par makeup allowed hai

questions.explanation: Clean skin treatment ke liye essential hai, isliye makeup remove karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Client ko MD se pehle excessive sun exposure avoid karne ki salah kyun deni chahiye?

options.A: Tanning ko kharab karne ke liye
options.B: Sunburn aur skin sensitivity se bachne ke liye
options.C: Vitamin D deficiency se bachne ke liye
options.D: Skin ko dry rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sun exposure skin ko sensitive bana deta hai aur sunburn ka risk badha deta hai, jo MD ke liye contraindication hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko keloid scars ki history ho, toh MD karna chahiye?

options.A: Ha, keloids MD se theek hote hain
options.B: Nahi, keloid formation ka risk badh sakta hai
options.C: Sirf chote keloids par kar sakte hain
options.D: Consult a dermatologist first, but generally avoid

questions.explanation: Keloid-prone skin par abrasive treatments se naye keloids banne ka risk hota hai, isliye MD avoid karna ya dermatologist se consult karna best hai.

questions.question: Client ko MD treatment ke baad kaun se products use karne ki salah denge?

options.B: Gentle cleanser, hydrating moisturizer, aur broad-spectrum sunscreen

questions.explanation: MD ke baad skin sensitive hoti hai, isliye gentle, hydrating aur protective products use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Consent form sign karwana kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Client ki personal details collect karne ke liye
options.B: Client ko treatment ke risks, benefits aur alternatives ke baare mein inform karne aur unki agreement lene ke liye
options.C: Treatment ki payment lene ke liye

questions.explanation: Consent form legally binding hai aur ensure karta hai ki client ko treatment ke baare mein poori jaankari hai aur woh apni marzi se treatment le rahe hain.

questions.question: Agar client ko bleeding disorder ho, toh MD karna chahiye?

options.B: Nahi, bleeding aur bruising ka risk badh jaata hai
options.C: Sirf light settings par kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Bleeding disorders wale clients mein MD se excessive bleeding aur bruising ka risk badh jaata hai, isliye avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Pre-treatment skin preparation mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Cleansing, toning, aur degreasing the skin

questions.explanation: Skin ko MD ke liye prepare karne ke liye cleansing, toning aur degreasing important hai taaki treatment effective ho aur infection ka risk kam ho.

questions.question: Microdermabrasion machine ko operate karte waqt kaun sa PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) pehenna zaroori hai?

options.B: Gloves aur safety glasses

questions.explanation: Technician ki safety ke liye gloves aur safety glasses pehenna zaroori hai, taaki crystals ya skin debris se bachav ho.

questions.question: MD handpiece ko skin par kis angle par rakhna chahiye?

options.B: 45-degree angle

questions.explanation: Handpiece ko skin par flat rakhna chahiye taaki even exfoliation ho aur skin ko damage na ho.

questions.question: MD treatment ke dauran skin ko stretch karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Client ko uncomfortable banane ke liye
options.B: Treatment area ko smooth aur flat banane ke liye, for even exfoliation
options.D: Skin ko tight karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Skin ko stretch karne se uneven areas aur wrinkles smooth ho jaate hain, jisse handpiece evenly move karta hai aur better results milte hain.

questions.question: Normal skin type ke liye MD machine ki suction setting kya honi chahiye?

options.B: Medium

questions.explanation: Normal skin ke liye medium suction setting appropriate hoti hai, jo effective exfoliation provide karti hai without causing excessive irritation.

questions.question: MD treatment ke dauran kitne 'passes' kiye jaate hain generally?

options.B: 1-3 passes per area

questions.explanation: Generally, 1-3 passes per area kiye jaate hain, depending on client ki skin sensitivity aur desired results.

questions.question: MD karte waqt kis area ko avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: Cheeks
options.C: Eyes ke bohot kareeb aur lips par

questions.explanation: Eyes ke bohot kareeb aur lips par skin bahut thin aur sensitive hoti hai, isliye in areas ko avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: MD machine ke filters ko regularly clean karna ya change karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Machine ko zyada noise karne se bachane ke liye
options.B: Hygiene maintain karne aur machine ki performance ke liye

questions.explanation: Filters clogged hone se machine ki suction power kam ho jaati hai aur cross-contamination ka risk badh jaata hai.

questions.question: Diamond-tipped handpiece ko kaise sterilize karna chahiye after each use?

options.A: Simply wipe with a dry cloth
options.B: Wash with soap and water only
options.C: Clean with a disinfectant solution and then sterilize as per manufacturer guidelines

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination se bachne ke liye handpiece ko thoroughly clean aur sterilize karna critical hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko treatment ke dauran discomfort ya pain feel ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Treatment rok kar settings adjust karna ya stop karna

questions.explanation: Client ki comfort aur safety paramount hai, discomfort hone par settings adjust karna ya treatment stop karna chahiye.

questions.question: Crystal Microdermabrasion mein crystals ko kaise dispose karna chahiye?

options.B: Sink mein flush kar dena
options.C: Bio-hazardous waste ke roop mein dispose karna

questions.explanation: Used crystals mein dead skin cells aur debris hote hain, isliye unhe bio-hazardous waste ke roop mein dispose karna chahiye to prevent contamination.

questions.question: MD treatment ke baad skin ko soothe karne ke liye kya apply karna chahiye?

options.B: Cool, hydrating mask ya serum

questions.explanation: MD ke baad skin sensitive hoti hai, isliye cool aur hydrating products use karne se redness aur irritation kam hoti hai.

questions.question: MD machine ko store karte waqt kin baaton ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Dry aur clean jagah par store karna

questions.explanation: Machine ko dry aur clean jagah par store karne se uski longevity aur hygiene maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: MD ke dauran improper technique se kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Skin irritation, redness, ya bruising

questions.explanation: Improper technique jaise excessive pressure ya multiple passes se skin irritation, redness, aur bruising ho sakti hai.

questions.question: MD treatment ke liye client ko kis position mein litana chahiye?

options.B: Lying flat on their back, comfortable

questions.explanation: Client ko comfortable, supine position mein litana chahiye taaki technician easily access kar sake aur client relax rahe.

questions.question: MD treatment ke baad skin ko warm water se wash karna chahiye ya cool water se?

options.B: Cool water

questions.explanation: Cool water skin ko soothe karta hai aur redness ko kam karne mein help karta hai, jabki warm water irritation badha sakta hai.

questions.question: MD machine ke vacuum pressure ko adjust karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Machine ki speed control karne ke liye
options.B: Client ki skin type aur sensitivity ke according treatment adjust karne ke liye
options.C: Electricity consumption control karne ke liye
options.D: Crystals ki quantity control karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Vacuum pressure ko adjust karne se treatment ki intensity control hoti hai, jo different skin types aur areas ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: During the MD procedure, it's crucial to maintain a consistent speed of the handpiece to avoid:

options.B: Uneven exfoliation or stripes on the skin

questions.explanation: Consistent speed maintain karna zaroori hai taaki exfoliation evenly ho aur skin par streaks ya patches na bane.

questions.question: Skin polishing ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: Skin ko smooth, radiant aur even-toned banana
options.C: Deep wrinkles ko completely remove karna

questions.explanation: Skin polishing dead cells ko remove karke skin ko smooth, radiant aur even-toned banata hai.

questions.question: Microdermabrasion ke baad immediate post-care mein kya karna chahiye?

options.B: SPF ke saath moisturizer apply karna

questions.explanation: MD ke baad skin sensitive hoti hai, isliye hydration aur sun protection bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: MD ke baad kitne time tak direct sun exposure avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: 24-48 hours

questions.explanation: MD ke baad skin photosensitive ho jaati hai, isliye kam se kam 1 week tak direct sun exposure avoid karna chahiye to prevent hyperpigmentation.

questions.question: MD ke baad skin par scrubbing ya harsh exfoliants ka use kitne time tak avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: Kam se kam 1 week tak
options.D: Koi zarurat nahi avoid karne ki

questions.explanation: Skin already exfoliated aur sensitive hoti hai, isliye us par aur scrubbing ya harsh exfoliants use karne se irritation aur damage ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Skin polishing mein kaun se methods shamil ho sakte hain, apart from MD?

options.B: Gentle chemical peels, enzyme peels, fine grain scrubs

questions.explanation: Skin polishing mein MD ke alawa light chemical peels, enzyme peels aur fine grain scrubs bhi shamil ho sakte hain, jo skin ko smooth karte hain.

questions.question: MD ke baad client ko kis type ke cleansers recommend karne chahiye?

options.B: Alcohol-based cleansers

questions.explanation: Gentle, hydrating cleansers skin ki natural barrier ko maintain karte hain aur irritation se bachate hain.

questions.question: MD ke baad waxing ya threading kitne time tak avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: Kam se kam 5-7 din tak

questions.explanation: Waxing aur threading skin ko pull karte hain, aur MD ke baad skin sensitive hoti hai, isliye irritation aur damage se bachne ke liye avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Post-treatment care mein client ko hydration ke liye kya advise denge?

options.B: Zyada pani peena aur hydrating serums use karna

questions.explanation: Internal aur external hydration dono skin healing aur healthy glow ke liye essential hain.

questions.question: MD ke baad swimming pool mein kitne time tak avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: 24-48 hours

questions.explanation: Swimming pool ke chlorine aur chemicals skin ko irritated kar sakte hain jab skin sensitive ho, isliye 24-48 hours tak avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Skin polishing ke liye enzyme peels ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Dead cells ko gently dissolve karte hain without harsh scrubbing
options.D: Sirf deep wrinkles ke liye hote hain

questions.explanation: Enzyme peels fruit enzymes use karte hain jo dead skin cells ke protein bonds ko gently break karte hain, making them suitable for sensitive skin.

questions.question: MD ke baad skin par itching ya redness hone par kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Cool compress apply karna aur hydrating serum lagana

questions.explanation: Cool compress aur hydrating products skin ko soothe karte hain aur irritation ko kam karte hain.

questions.question: Client ko MD ke baad makeup kab tak avoid karne ki salah denge?

options.B: Kam se kam 24 hours

questions.explanation: Makeup pores ko clog kar sakta hai aur sensitive skin ko irritate kar sakta hai, isliye 24 hours tak avoid karna best hai.

questions.question: Skin polishing mein physical scrubs ka use kaise karna chahiye?

options.B: Weekly ya bi-weekly, gently aur circular motions mein

questions.explanation: Physical scrubs ko gently aur moderate frequency par use karna chahiye taaki skin ko over-exfoliate na kare.

questions.question: MD treatment ke baad skin ko touch karne se kyun bachna chahiye?

options.A: Skin ko dry rakhne ke liye
options.B: Bacteria transfer aur irritation se bachne ke liye
options.C: Pores ko open rakhne ke liye
options.D: Treatment ke results ko kharab karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Hands par bacteria ho sakte hain jo sensitive skin par transfer hokar infection ya irritation cause kar sakte hain.

questions.question: What is the primary difference between Microdermabrasion and a superficial chemical peel?

options.B: MD uses mechanical exfoliation, while chemical peels use chemical solutions.

questions.explanation: MD ek mechanical exfoliation method hai jismein physical abrasion use hota hai, jabki chemical peels skin ko exfoliate karne ke liye acids use karte hain.

questions.question: Post-treatment instructions mein client ko kaun se activities avoid karne ki salah denge?

options.B: Strenuous exercise aur excessive sweating

questions.explanation: Strenuous exercise aur sweating se skin pores clog ho sakte hain aur irritation badh sakti hai, isliye kuch din tak avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Microdermabrasion ko kis other treatment ke saath combine kiya ja sakta hai for enhanced results?

options.B: Hydrating facials, light chemical peels, LED light therapy

questions.explanation: MD ke baad skin products ko better absorb karti hai, isliye hydrating facials, light peels ya LED therapy ke saath combine karne se results enhance hote hain.

questions.question: Agar client ko MD ke baad excessive redness aur swelling ho, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Immediate medical attention recommend karna

questions.explanation: Excessive redness aur swelling complications ke signs ho sakte hain, isliye immediate medical attention ki zaroorat ho sakti hai.

questions.question: MD machine ke regular maintenance mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Machine ko saaf rakhna, filters change karna, aur manufacturer ke guidelines follow karna
options.C: Machine ko kabhi saaf nahi karna

questions.explanation: Regular maintenance machine ki performance, longevity aur hygiene ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Client ko MD treatment ke baare mein galat information dena kis category mein aata hai?

options.B: Professional ethics ka violation

questions.explanation: Client ko accurate aur truthful information dena professional ethics ka hissa hai. Misleading information dena unethical hai.

questions.question: Aesthetician ko client ke records ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.B: Confidential aur secure tarike se maintain karna

questions.explanation: Client privacy aur data security professional practice ka important aspect hai.

questions.question: Agar MD ke baad client ki skin par bruising dikhe toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Next session mein suction badha dena
options.C: Client ko reassure karna, cool compress suggest karna aur next time settings adjust karna

questions.explanation: Mild bruising ho sakti hai, client ko reassure karna aur future sessions mein suction ya passes adjust karna important hai.

questions.question: MD ke baad hyperpigmentation ka risk kin clients mein zyada hota hai?

options.B: Darker skin tone wale clients aur jinhe sun exposure zyada ho

questions.explanation: Darker skin tones mein post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation ka risk zyada hota hai, especially with sun exposure.

questions.question: Professional development ke liye aesthetician ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Ek baar training lekar ruk jaana
options.B: Regularly naye courses, workshops aur certifications lena

questions.explanation: Beauty aur aesthetics industry constantly evolve karti hai, isliye continuous learning aur skill enhancement zaroori hai.

questions.question: MD ke baad client ko pimples ya breakouts ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Gentle cleansing aur non-comedogenic products suggest karna, aur agar persist kare toh dermatologist ko consult karne ki salah dena

questions.explanation: MD ke baad skin detoxify ho sakti hai, jisse temporary breakouts ho sakte hain. Gentle care aur professional advice lena important hai.

questions.question: Client ko MD treatment ke liye kya price point batana chahiye?

options.B: Market rate se bohot zyada
options.C: Fair aur transparent pricing, considering expenses aur expertise
options.D: Client ki look ke hisaab se price decide karna

questions.explanation: Fair aur transparent pricing professional integrity ka hissa hai.

questions.question: Effective client retention ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf ek baar achha service dena
options.B: Consistent quality service, good communication aur follow-ups

questions.explanation: Client retention ke liye trust, satisfaction aur consistent relationship building important hai.

questions.question: Agar client treatment ke results se dissatisfied ho, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Unki concerns ko sunna aur possible solutions ya follow-up sessions discuss karna
options.C: Unhe dusre clinic jaane ko kehna

questions.explanation: Client satisfaction important hai, unki concerns ko address karna aur solutions offer karna professional approach hai.

questions.question: MD treatment mein hygiene maintain karne ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Sirf client ko impress karne ke liye
options.B: Infection aur cross-contamination se bachne ke liye
options.C: Treatment ko zyada expensive banane ke liye
options.D: Machine ki life badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Hygiene infection control aur client safety ke liye paramount hai.

questions.question: MD machine ki calibration aur servicing kitne time mein karwani chahiye?

options.B: Jab machine kharab ho jaaye
options.C: Manufacturer ke recommendations ke according (usually annually)

questions.explanation: Regular calibration aur servicing machine ki optimal performance aur safety ensure karti hai.

questions.question: Client ko MD ke benefits over home exfoliation kaise samjhaoge?

options.B: MD provides deeper, more controlled exfoliation with professional-grade equipment and expertise, leading to more significant and consistent results.
options.C: MD is just a more expensive version of home exfoliation.
options.D: Don't explain, just perform the service.

questions.explanation: Professional MD controlled aur deeper exfoliation provide karta hai jo home treatments se possible nahi hai, resulting in better and safer outcomes.

questions.question: Professional aesthetician ko apne skills ko update rakhne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Industry magazines padhna, workshops attend karna, aur naye techniques seekhna
options.C: Sirf apne experience par rely karna

questions.explanation: Continuous learning aur skill development professional growth aur better client service ke liye essential hai.
